settings.benefits_subheading: Join free and unlock birthday rewards for you and your loved ones, all year long.
settings.benefit_1_desc: A special discount just for you on your big day
settings.benefit_2_desc: Your loved ones get their own birthday discount too
settings.benefit_3_desc: Come in on your birthday for a cupcake on us
settings.benefit_4_desc: Exclusive products and deals only for Birthday Club members
settings.step_1_text: Tell us your name, email, and birthday — that's all we need to start celebrating you.
settings.step_2_text: Add up to 4 family members so we can celebrate every birthday in your household.
settings.step_3_text: We'll send a special discount before each birthday. Order online or stop by.
settings.form_subtitle: Free to join. We'll celebrate you with a sweet treat on your big day.
settings.family_toggle_text: + Add family members for their own birthday perks
settings.success_message: You're all set! We'll send a special birthday discount before each birthday in your family.
